pageContext.name: Blue and Beta Deluxe
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Iron Studios are proud to announce the latest from the Deluxe Art Scale 1:10 line - Blue and Beta!  From the film Jurassic World Dominion, the Blue and Beta Deluxe Statue is limited edition, highly detailed, and hand-painted Jurassic Park collectible.  Jurassic World Dominion fans, don't miss your chance to add the Blue and Beta 1:10 Statue to your Jurassic Park collection!
